title: Rename money helpers across a small module graph
prompt: In the AgentLink eval fixture workspace, refactor the money helper names for clarity: rename formatCents to formatCurrency and addCents to addMoney. Update all imports/usages under fixtures/agent-eval-workspace/work, keep behavior unchanged, then run the fixture validation command and report what changed.
successCriteria: Money helper exports are renamed to formatCurrency and addMoney.
All imports/usages are updated across orders and invoices modules.
The fixture test command passes without behavior changes.
The final response reports validation and the touched files.
